# Google Antigravity

> AI Registry entry [AIR-34](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-34/google-antigravity) — status **Sandbox** as of 2026-05-04. Departments: —.

**Category:** Cloud-Based IDE / AI-Assisted Development Platform
**Cost per User/Month:** Free (Google account)
**Departments:** Technology

## Overview

Google's cloud-based IDE — browser-based coding with AI-powered assistance via Gemini. Similar to VS Code but cloud-only. Combines familiar editor interface with integrated Google Cloud and Firebase deployment. Branding history: Project IDX → Firebase Studio → Antigravity.

## Capabilities

* Browser-based IDE
* Gemini AI coding assistance
* Multi-language (JS/TS, Python, Go, Dart/Flutter, Java)
* Integrated terminal
* Live preview for web apps
* Cloud workspaces (persistent)
* Multi-framework templates (React, Next.js, Angular, Flutter)
* Direct deployment to GCP, Firebase Hosting, Cloud Run
* Collaboration via shareable URLs

## Integrations

* Google Cloud (AIR-7) — native deployment
* Firebase (AIR-31) — backend integration
* GitHub — repo import
* Google Gemini built-in
* Cloud Run for serverless
* Chrome DevTools

## Considerations

* Cloud-only — requires constant internet
* AI is Gemini-only — cannot use Claude Code (AIR-13)
* Overlaps with VS Code (AIR-15) + local setup
* Branding has shifted — assess product stability
* Limited offline capability

*Sandbox. Functional tier. Technology team evaluation.*
